title: Puerto Banus Yacht Charter Wedding: Costs and Tips for 2026
html:
For a wedding celebration on the Costa del Sol, a yacht charter in Puerto Banus offers an unforgettable setting on the Mediterranean Sea. Depart from the marina of Puerto Deportivo and expect prices from around EUR 3,000 for a half-day crewed yacht. BoatHire24 connects you with verified local operators to plan your special day.

How much does it cost to rent a yacht for a wedding in Puerto Banus?

Wedding yacht charters in Puerto Banus start at EUR 3,000 for a half-day and can exceed EUR 15,000 for a full-day luxury experience. The final price depends on the boat size, guest count, and added services like catering or decorations.

For a small ceremony with 10 guests, a motorboat or sailing yacht may cost EUR 3,000 to 5,000 for four hours. Larger vessels for 30 or more guests can run EUR 8,000 to 15,000 for a full day, often including crew, canapés, and personalised itineraries. Compare verified options on day charters in Puerto Banus to find a package that suits your budget.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Most wedding charters depart from Puerto Banus marina, a short drive from Marbella and Estepona. The marina is the epicentre of luxury boating on the Costa del Sol, with direct access to the Mediterranean.

Nearby departure points include Puerto José Banus (the main harbour), Marbella Marina for smaller boats, and Cabopino Port for a quieter start. The Bay of Marbella offers calm waters for vows, while the coast toward Fuengirola provides scenic backdrops. For a longer trip, boats often head toward the cliffs of Calahonda or the exclusive island of Isla Margarita (not actually an island but a residential area with a beach).

Which boat to rent

Choosing the right boat depends on your guest list and desired atmosphere. Here are four popular options for wedding charters in Puerto Banus:

  1. Motor yacht (e.g. Maiora 26m), Best for large weddings of up to 50 guests, with spacious decks and luxury amenities; from EUR 8,000 for a full day.
  2. Sailing catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 42), Ideal for a relaxed, intimate ceremony for 10-20 guests, with ample deck space; from EUR 4,000 for a half-day.
  3. Open speedboat (e.g. Axopar 28), Perfect for a small, adventurous wedding party of 8-10, zipping along the coast; from EUR 2,500 for 4 hours. For details, see the Limpopo charter page.
  4. Sunseeker Predator 74, A glamorous option for up to 30 guests, featuring a sunpad and bar; from EUR 10,000 for a full day.

Understanding the costs

Wedding charter costs in Puerto Banus vary by boat type, duration, and services. Below is a typical price breakdown for 2026:

  • Shared sunset tour: EUR 80-150 per person, often not private but good for small parties.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours, up to 10 guests): EUR 2,500-4,000.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours, up to 20 guests): EUR 5,000-8,000, including soft drinks and light snacks.
  • Luxury crewed yacht full-day (up to 50 guests): EUR 8,000-15,000, with full catering and wedding coordination.

Do you need a licence to charter a yacht for a wedding in Puerto Banus?

For a crewed wedding charter, no licence is needed as the boat comes with a professional captain. If you wish to rent a boat without a skipper, Spanish law requires a valid boating licence (PER or ICC). The operator on the platform confirms exact requirements before booking.

For a stress-free wedding, book with a captain who knows the local waters, such as the levanter wind that picks up in the afternoon. A morning ceremony near Cabopino usually offers calmer seas.

Season for wedding charters in Puerto Banus

The high season runs from June to September, when weather is warm and the sea is calmest. July and August are peak months, with temperatures averaging 30°C and the local poniente wind bringing stable conditions. May and October offer pleasant weather with fewer crowds, while winter charters are possible but less predictable.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 2,500-15,000 for half or full day
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Typical trip length: 4-8 hours
  • Maximum capacity: 8-50 guests (varies by boat)
  • Currency: EUR
  • Departure point: Puerto Banus, Marbella

Questions about yacht charter weddings in Puerto Banus

Can we get married on the boat itself?

Many charter operators allow a symbolic ceremony on board, but you will need a civil registration ashore in Marbella town hall for a legal marriage.

Can we provide our own food and decorations?

Most crewed charters include catering packages, but some operators allow you to bring your own cake or flowers; check the listing before booking.

How far in advance should we book for a 2026 wedding?

For peak months, book at least 3 to 6 months ahead to secure your preferred yacht and date.

What happens if the weather is bad?

The captain has final say on safety; if conditions are poor, you can often reschedule or receive a partial refund, as outlined in the terms.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Puerto Banus or list your own. Whether you are planning a wedding or another celebration, explore the BoatHire24 marketplace to find the perfect vessel and compare local operators. Boat owners are welcome to list their boats and reach couples seeking a unique venue.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
